articles.title: Sales Tech Stack Signals: What's Shifting in 2026
articles.excerpt: From Salesforce upgrades to smarter B2B event tools, the sales tech landscape is evolving fast. Here's what RevOps teams need to know.

articles.title: Why AI in Sales Requires a Completely Different Playbook
articles.excerpt: AI is reshaping sales and CRM faster than any previous technology shift. Here's why old automation thinking will hold your team back.
